ec2.subnetcidrblock.CfnAbout: Associates a CIDR block with your subnet. You can associate a single IPv6 CIDR block with your subnet. An IPv6 CIDR block must have a prefix length of /64.

ec2.subnetcidrblock.Ipv6CidrBlock.Description: The IPv6 network range for the subnet, in CIDR notation. The subnet size must use a /64 prefix length.  This parameter is required for an IPv6 only subnet.
